_note: COHERENT PREVIEW + RESULT TEST (needs the NEW DLL with the forecast POKE + 4th finalizer + asm fix). Goal: BOTH the physical attack AND Fire previews compute exactly 500, and the actual hit removes exactly 500. FOUR coordinated levers, all set to 500: (1) PreviewForecastPoke = universal poll-write of obj+0x6 (=unit+0x1C4) -> number + HP-bar follow it for ANY action (proven live 2026-06-28); shows on preview (re)open. (2) PreviewForecastSource = compute-time finalizer hooks (0x30637E confirmed MAGIC; 0x308D8F added = physical-attack candidate) -> first-open-clean bar where covered; per-site counters reveal which fired. (3) PreviewDamage = display-number paint -> guarantees the NUMBER reads 500 every open. (4) PreClamp at the FIXED rva 0x30A66F (decimal 3188335; the prior 3188847=0x30A86F was a hex->dec typo and SKIPPED) forces the applied HP debit to 500 on Ramza (charId 1), up to 50 writes, floor 1 HP. Hit% forced to 11. EXPECTED: Agrias ATTACK preview on Ramza -> 11% / 500 / bar drops 567->67. Agrias FIRE preview on Ramza -> 11% / 500 / bar drops 567->67. Actually ATTACK and actually CAST Fire -> Ramza loses exactly 500 (567->67) each (MinHp keeps him at >=1). RUN: game + Reloaded closed so Claude can deploy; enable ONLY fftivc.utility.modloader + fftivc.generic.chronicle.codemod; data mod fftivc.generic.chronicle DISABLED; unequip Ramza reaction.
